zh.Ipswich Saint Mary at the Quay, Suffolk,: 英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當George Parkhurst Sr於1589年5月出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，他的父親John Parkhurst34歲，母親Sara11586歲。他於1610年3月29日與Phebe Leete在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1675年6月18日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國素福爾可易普斯維其易普斯維其 聖 勞倫斯。

zh-hans.Ipswich Saint Mary at the Quay, Suffolk,: 英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Parkhurst Sr于1589年5月出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，他的父亲John Parkhurst34岁，母亲Sara11586岁。他于1610年3月29日与Phebe Leete在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1675年6月18日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国素福爾可易普斯維其易普斯維其 聖 勞倫斯。

nameMeanings.name: Parkhurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Parkhurst, such as Parkhurst in Buxted (Sussex), which is recorded as Perkehurst in 1439, and Parkhurst in Abinger (Surrey), which is recorded as Parkherst in 1464. The placenames derive from Middle English park ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc) or parrok ‘enclosure, paddock’ (Old English pearroc) + hirste ‘hillock, copse’ (Old English hyrst).

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When George Parkhurst Sr was born in May 1589, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, his father, John Parkhurst, was 34 and his mother, Sara, was 11586. He married Phebe Leete on 29 March 1610, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died before 18 June 1675, in his hometown, and was buried in Ipswich St Lawrence, Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Parkhurst Sr est né en mai 1589, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Parkhurst, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Sara, avait 11586 ans. Il a épousé Phebe Leete le 29 mars 1610, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 juin 1675, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Ipswich St Lawrence, Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Parkhurst Sr im Mai 1589 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Parkhurst 34 und seine Mutter Sara 11586. Er hat am 29. März 1610 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Phebe Leete geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb vor 18. Juni 1675 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ipswich St Lawrence, Ipswich, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Parkhurst Sr è nato il nel maggio 1589 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Parkhurst, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Sara, aveva 11586 anni. Lui sposato Phebe Leete il 29 marzo 1610, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 18 giugno 1675, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Ipswich St Lawrence, Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: George Parkhurst Srが1589年5月にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父John Parkhurstは34歳，母Saraは11586歳であった。1610年3月29日にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチでPhebe Leeteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1675年6月18日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリススフォルクイプスウィチイプスウィチ スト ラウレンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Parkhurst Sr(이)가 1589년 5월 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Parkhurst(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Sara(은)는 11586세였다. 그는 1610년 3월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 Phebe Leete(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1675년 6월 18일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 이프스위치 이프스위치 스트 로렌스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Parkhurst Sr nasceu em maio de 1589, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Parkhurst, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Sara, tinha 11586 anos. Ele casou-se com Phebe Leete em 29 de março de 1610, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de junho de 1675, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Ipswich St Lawrence, Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Parkhurst Sr родился май 1589 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Parkhurst было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Sara, 11586. Он женился на женщине по имени Phebe Leete 29 марта 1610 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер перед 18 июнь 1675 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ипсвич ст ларенс, ипсвич, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Parkhurst Sr nació en mayo de 1589, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Parkhurst, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Sara, tenía 11586 años. Se casó con Phebe Leete el 29 de marzo de 1610, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 18 de junio de 1675, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Ipswich St Lawrence, Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
